sources.title: Legality of cannabis by U.S. jurisdiction

main_articles.title: Legality of cannabis by U.S. jurisdiction

notes_main_articles.title: Legality of cannabis by U.S. jurisdiction

notes_text: Legal to possess medically. Patients may now access up to 10 mg of THC per serving and 1 gram per package, and are permitted to vape and nebulize THC products in addition to other forms.
